Propitiations fOf' malefic Ketu:
1. Do japa of Ketu mantra 108 times daily.
2. Wear or keep at home Ketu yantra.
3. Do puja of Ganeshji.
4. Give dan of articles related to Ketu.
5. Do not wear multicolored clothes.
6. Give dan to Brahmins on Thursday.
7. Give milk and chapatti to a multicolored dog.
8. Give green food to multicolored cow.
9. Give bfac:lc and white til to ants.
10. Do not allow lizards at home.
